rulings.Case Title: FRANK STONICH et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND: (1) 1st cause of action for fraud- to allege each element of fraud with particularity as to loan modification only; (2) third cause of action for CCC 2924 violation - to allege actionable violation; (3) fourth cause of action for UCL violation- to allege all elements of this cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: NORTHWEST TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Motion For Release Of Interpleaded Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 6. Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s Motion For Release Of Interpleaded Funds DENIED without prejudice because petition to lodge funds has never been heard and funds not deposited with the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. and ROBERT CAMOZZI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to 11th causes of action for UCL violation to allege facts showing ongoing conduct. Overruled as to other causes of action, approved sub-tenancy sufficiently alleged. Paragraphs 17 and 18. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT ALVIN BAUM's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion is granted as to request for punitive damages re: negligence cause of action. Motion is denied as moot re: UCL cause of action; motion is denied re: prayer for punitive damages and request for punitive damages as to 1st and 7th causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT ALVIN BAUM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to 11th cause of action for UCL violation, no ongoing conduct. Overruled as to other causes of action, approved sub-tenancy sufficiently alleged. Paragraphs 17 and 18. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC.and ROBERT CAMOZZI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion is granted as to request for punitive damages re: negligence cause of action. Motion is denied as moot re: UCL cause of action; motion is denied re: prayer for punitive damages and request for punitive damages as to 1st and 7th causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WING CHAN et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.; RECONTRUST CO N.A. and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to June 25, 2013. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than June 14, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LYNN SIMONCINI SARMIENTO VS. GMC MORTGAGE INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to third cause of action for wrongful foreclosure and fifth cause of action for quiet title to allege all elements of these causes of action. No opposition filed. Defendant's Counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LYNN SIMONCINI SARMIENTO VS. GMC MORTGAGE INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend. Defendant's Counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 5, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT NOELLE FURRER's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED as to purported service on May 26, 2013. = (501/REQ)
